title: Stage-2 Direct normalized admission binding (spot.stage02.direct_admission_binding.v1)
description: The NORMALIZED binding a neutral adapter DERIVES from the immutable native W10 admission report plus the Direct bundle on disk. The native report (spot.stage02_direct_arm_bundle_verification.v1) stays the SOLE admission source and is not mutated; this binding is what Step0, temporal, P2S, pathway and the aggregate all read through one seam instead of three ad-hoc field-pickings and a Markdown file. Every value here was independently RE-DERIVED by the adapter from bytes on disk — the bundle files re-hashed, the mask re-derived from masks.parquet, the self-hash re-computed — never copied and trusted from the report.

source_report_sha256.description: The native report's report_sha256, RE-DERIVED by the adapter from the report body.

native_verdict.description: The native token, carried VERBATIM. Never case-folded.

disposition.description: The aggregate's disposition, mapped byte-exactly from the native token.

solver_lock_sha256.description: The environment lock, re-confirmed against the hard pin.

mask_sha256.description: RE-DERIVED by the adapter from the bundle's masks.parquet (canonical order) and cross-checked against the bundle's own provenance binding. null only when the bundle was not verified on disk.

direct_bundle_sha256.description: Every shipped bundle file, RE-HASHED from disk by the adapter. Empty when the bundle was not verified on disk.

bundle_verified_on_disk.description: Whether the adapter re-hashed the bundle and re-derived the mask from disk. A binding without on-disk verification carries only what the report claimed.

binding_sha256.description: sha256 over this binding without this field. The binding is itself self-hashed, so a normalized value cannot be edited after it is cited.
